title: Implement a Simple Cache for Book Titles
statement: Create a RESTful API using Express.js that manages a simple cache to store and retrieve book titles. Implement a single endpoint to store a book title with its ID and another endpoint to retrieve the book title by its ID from the cache. Consider implementing a mechanism to invalidate the cache when a new book title is added or updated.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array or mock database provided for caching
Cache should store book titles for a minimum of 10 seconds

endpoints.description: Add a new book title to the cache. Request Body should contain bookId and title. Returns the newly added book title and a success message.
Retrieve a book title from the cache by its ID. Returns the book title or a message indicating that the book title is not available in the cache.
